task: I found a small wallet at school and I’m trying to make sure I handle it the right way. What should I do first before I touch anything inside it?

turns.agent_response:
First, **turn it in to the office or a teacher right away** and **don’t open it**.

If you can do it safely, **pick it up without looking inside**, and tell them **where you found it** so they can help return it faster. If it’s already in your hand, just keep it closed and take it straight to an adult.

user_simulator.text: Yeah, that’s right. I’d take it to the office and tell them where I found it. Don’t open it first.
